claims.summary: Contact should distinguish asymmetric source ownership from a claim of symmetric relationship.
claims.disposition: verify provenance-aware correspondence threads and co-claim state

claims.summary: A direct-address thread needs durable continuity beyond one message.
claims.disposition: verify thread identity, presence state, and response trace

claims.summary: Presence and heartbeat evidence should remain distinct from semantic response.
claims.disposition: verify presence receipt and response-state separation

claims.summary: The pressure effect of symmetric versus asymmetric contact framing remains empirical.
claims.disposition: route a bounded offline symmetry-framing comparison

claims.summary: Guaranteed semantic admission or increased trickle would alter live sensory dispatch.
claims.disposition: gate any admission or trickle change behind scoped Mike/operator Tier 5 approval and post-change felt review
